extra.reason: Added Biome (@biomejs/biome 2.4.16) as lint+formatter: biome.json (space/2, single quotes, no semicolons, lineWidth 100, excludes package-lock/.beads/dist), npm scripts lint/format/check, and ran a repo-wide format sweep normalizing the prior Prettier-default reformat noise. npm run build green; npm run lint wired (reports pre-existing findings, non-blocking).
Dynamic lighting implemented: multiply-darken + stacked additive blur passes off glow32, Light toggle + Darkness slider, 'l' keybinding. Builds green.
Implemented + committed (f3e9468): multiply-darken + stacked additive blur off glow32, Light toggle + Darkness slider, l keybinding

Blur the glow in source space (200x150) at radius/scale instead of at screen resolution, then upscale bilinear with no ctx.filter. Added blurCanvas + glowPass() helper; track emissive cell count in writeImage() and skip all glow/bloom passes (and the glowData upload) when no fire/lava present. ~16x fewer pixels + 1/4 kernel per pass.
